description_long: This object represents a highly distorted adult pedestrian figure, with elongated and warped limbs and body parts. The head is discernible and appears to be human, but the arms and legs are stretched into unnatural, angular forms, giving the figure a surreal, abstract appearance. The torso is twisted and the lower body is disproportionately extended, with the legs splayed out in different directions. The clothing is vaguely suggested, with areas that resemble pants and a shirt, but the details are heavily deformed. The overall form is thin and fragmented, with large gaps and sharp bends throughout the structure. The figure does not appear to be carrying any objects or accessories, and the posture is dynamic but highly unnatural.
description: A distorted, abstract adult pedestrian figure with elongated limbs and a twisted body, featuring vague clothing details and a surreal, fragmented form.
description_view_0: The front view shows the head, upper torso, and both arms extended outward, with the legs bent and splayed in different directions.
description_view_1: This side view emphasizes the extreme elongation and angularity of the limbs, with the head and torso partially obscured.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the back of the head and the stretched, angular legs, with the arms extending far to the sides.
description_view_3: This side/rear view shows the twisted torso and the exaggerated, bent limbs, with the figure's form appearing fragmented and abstract.
attribute_posture: dynamic, highly distorted pose with limbs extended and bent
